SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: STATUS_340B_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCDPD DataQ™ 

VALUES: Y = Yes, pharmacy participates in a 340B program 
N = No, pharmacy does not participate in a 340B program 
Null/missing = This information has not been reported by the pharmacy 

COMMENT: This variable is new in 2012. This information is optional, and not required to be reported by 
pharmacies to NCPDP.
